title: Experience chic haircuts and stunning highlights at Zeno Hair Studio, offering full or partial transformations with up to 51% off

pricing_options.label: Haircut with Wash and Partial Highlights
Haircut with Wash and Full Highlights

highlights_html: Enhance your look with sun-kissed highlights and a flattering haircut from skilled stylists for extra dimension
highlights_text: Enhance your look with sun-kissed highlights and a flattering haircut from skilled stylists for extra dimension
about_deal_html:
Ever wonder how a simple haircut can completely redefine your vibe? Tired of dull, lifeless locks that don’t do your personality justice? Whether you're after a chic trim or bold new style, these options are your ticket to hair that speaks volumes! From sleek washes and cuts to radiant highlights, you'll leave feeling refreshed and confident. Why settle for the ordinary when the extraordinary awaits?

What we offer

This deal includes various hair services such as full or partial highlights along with a haircut and wash. Each option caters to different needs whether you're looking for a full color change or just a refreshing cut. Services are tailored using personalized artistry techniques.

  • Haircut, Wash, and Full Highlights: A complete package for those wanting full color transformation.
  • Haircut, Wash, and Partial Highlights: Perfect for adding subtle dimension without going all out.
  • Haircut, Wash, and Style: Get a chic cut followed by styling that suits any occasion.

Why you should grab the offer

Choosing this offer means embracing top-notch service from expert stylists who focus on personalized care tailored just for you. Located in the heart of NYC's bustling cultural scene makes every visit an event worth anticipating. Zeno Hair Studio provides innovative treatments using cutting-edge technology that elevates both style and hair health. Enjoy services in a luxurious ambiance designed to offer relaxation while prioritizing sustainability with eco-friendly practices. These thoughtful touches ensure clients leave not only looking great but feeling great about their choice as well.

fine_print: Merchant's standard cancellation policy applies (any fees not to exceed Groupon price).
Limit 1 per person(s), may buy 2 additional as gift(s).
All goods or services must be used by the same person.

faqs.question: What service options does Zeno Hair Studio offer for this deal?
What is the difference between the partial and full highlights options at Zeno Hair Studio?
Where is Zeno Hair Studio located in New York, NY?
Is the Chic Haircuts with Full or Partial Highlights for Women deal available exclusively for women?

review_quotes.text: Kevin was great. He cut my hair exactly as I requested. Excellent haircut! Very conscientious and personable.
review_quotes.author: Marianne

review_quotes.text: OMG!!!! Gilbert is a freaking genius!!!!! IM OBSESSED with my new hair! I bought a Groupon for Full Head Highlights plus haircut!! He did an amazing job!!! I was nervous but I couldn’t believe the results! I feel like a rockstar!! 10000% recommend everyone to come here! They do charge an extra fee depending on your hair length plus the toner but totally fair and you’ll end up so happy with the results that you won’t care by the end of the appointment!!! I’m soooo happy! I think this is the best
review_quotes.author: Gabriela

review_quotes.text: Great experience! I love the cut and coloring. Coming back for keratine next!
review_quotes.author: maria

review_quotes.text: Given the price of this offer, I wasn't sure what to anticipate or how my hair might turn out. I am thrilled with the haircut I got!! I got my hair cut shorter and added bangs. The stylist knew exactly how to provide what I had in mind, and provided a super cute style that I've gotten nonstop compliments on. I'm really pleased with how this went!!
review_quotes.author: Tori

review_quotes.text: Excellent cut and very pleasant staff.
review_quotes.author: Paula
